# Missoula.business

> AI and automation consulting for small businesses in Missoula, Montana and surrounding areas.

## About

Missoula.business is operated by J Scott Chapman, founder of Ravenview Services, a Missoula-based technology consulting firm with over ten years of experience. The mission is simple: help machines do machine work so humans can do human work.

We help local businesses leverage artificial intelligence and automation to eliminate busy work, replace manual processes, and gain a competitive edge — so they can focus on what their business actually does.

## Services

- Marketing & Social Media: Content calendars, social posts, email campaigns — planned and drafted by AI so you can focus on running your business.
- Competitor & Market Research: Know what your competitors are doing, what customers are saying, and where the opportunities are — without spending hours digging.
- Daily Operations: Scheduling, invoicing, follow-ups, data entry — automate the repetitive tasks that eat every small business owner's day.
- Business Planning & Strategy: Product strategy, financial modeling, pricing analysis — AI-powered tools that help you make better decisions faster.
- Website & Online Presence: Get a professional website up fast, improve your SEO, and make sure customers can find you online.
- Custom Software Development: Building tailored applications when off-the-shelf solutions fall short — from simple tools to full platforms.

## Free Business Audit

Every engagement starts with a free business audit. We research your competitors, analyze your online presence, and show you exactly where automation can save you time and money. No commitment required.

## Case Study: Tech Fix SMS Platform

An automotive training company was struggling with student engagement between assessments. Their team was stretched thin sending manual reminders, with no way to personalize outreach or track what worked.

J Scott Chapman built an automated SMS platform that analyzed each student's assessment scores, identified their weakest areas, and sent personalized daily training links — no manual effort required.

Results:
- 2x student engagement (doubled compared to control group)
- 98% SMS delivery rate
- 10 hours saved per week in admin time
- 2 weeks from concept to launch

> "Scott has a rare ability to bridge the gap between an idea and the final product. His contributions were instrumental to the success of our program." — Lowell Greene, TechFix / ATG

## Approach

1. Conversation — Understand the business, its pain points, and goals.
2. Diagnosis — Map workflows and identify highest-impact opportunities.
3. Solution — Build, deploy, and train your team.
4. Results — Measure time saved, errors eliminated, and revenue gained.

## Who This Is For

Any Missoula-area small business dealing with:
- Repetitive manual tasks consuming staff time
- Social media and marketing that never gets done
- No clear strategy for using AI or automation
- A desire to use technology for competitive advantage
- Needing a professional website or better online presence

Industries served include restaurants, retail, professional services, construction, healthcare, and more.

## FAQ

Q: Can AI help with social media and marketing for my small business?
A: Absolutely. AI can draft social media posts, plan content calendars, write email campaigns, and analyze what your competitors are doing — saving hours every week.

Q: How can AI help a small business in Missoula?
A: AI can automate daily tasks like scheduling, invoicing, and follow-ups. It can research competitors, draft marketing content, plan business strategy, build websites, and analyze data. We offer a free business audit to show you exactly where AI can save you time and money.

Q: Do I need to understand AI to work with you?
A: No. We take a business-first approach — we understand your challenges, then handle the technology.

Q: What does it cost?
A: Every engagement starts with a free business audit. Solutions are scoped to your needs and budget, always targeting measurable ROI.

Q: How long does a project take?
A: Some automations deliver in days. Larger custom builds run weeks to a few months, with iterative delivery so you see results early.

Q: What's the difference between this and hiring an IT company?
A: IT companies keep your systems running. We make your business run better — turning manual processes into competitive advantages using AI and automation.
